summary: Created TheDarkFactory master plan: business strategy (Memex+AgentBridge SaaS focus, kill commodity projects), development framework (12-question spec, tech decision tree, scaffold script, quality gates), AI-native dev standard (CLAUDE.md mandatory, code patterns, review rules, Memex integration), 90-day survival plan with revenue milestones. Rewrote QUICKSTART.md for public audience. Updated all paths from TheBlackFactory to TheDarkFactory (zshrc, MCP server, git hooks in all 5 repos). Full plan saved to ~/code/claude_plan.md.
